name: hb_7_2
requirements: As part of your analysis, for station 269 over 2025-06-10 08:00-18:00 compute and store: mean_pm25, max_pm25, mean_aqi (float), exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), peak_pm25_hour_of_day (0-23, int).

turns.query: Analyze the collective pollution transport from Handan steel enterprise cluster to air quality station: Youth Activity Center (station_id: 269) during 2025-06-10 08:00:00 to 2025-06-10 18:00:00.
